sql.where:
AND platform = #{platform} AND product_id = #{productId}
AND review_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

mapper.select:
SELECT review_no AS reviewNo, platform, product_id AS productId, rating, sentiment, review_content AS reviewContent, review_date AS reviewDate, nickname FROM t_review
ORDER BY review_date DESC NULLS LAST, review_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_review (review_no, platform, product_id, rating, sentiment, review_content, review_date, nickname) VALUES (seq_t_review_no.nextval, #{platform}, #{productId}, #{rating}, #{sentiment}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewDate}, #{nickname})
